Component.Name: DetailFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 92; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 24; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Center; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(ButtonBarVisible) = "1"; ANIM: FromRight; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: flexLayout1
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(5) TARGET(UNKNOWN5)

Component.Name: HeaderFlex
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 13; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Stretch; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0.625,1.4) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 44; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.17) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 15; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(DerPictureExists) = 1; MARGIN: 0.25,0.25,0.25,0.25; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 15; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(DerPictureExists) = 0; VISINDESIGN: False) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 10; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; MARGIN: 0,0,0,0.25) REGION8(ID: UNKNOWN8; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION9(ID: UNKNOWN9; VALUE: 24; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION10(ID: UNKNOWN10; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Top; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0) TARGET(UNKNOWN0)

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 15fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 85fl; ORIEN: Fill; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

EventHandler.Name: CalcReviewDate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLEmployees.HRCalcRvwSp( PARMS(VAR P(EmpNum), VAR P(ADate), VAR P(ReviewDate), RVAR V(NewReviewDate)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetApplicantData
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLEmployeesInternal.GetApplicantDataSp( PARMS(VAR C(AppNumEdit), RVAR P(AppNum), RVAR P(Lname), RVAR P(Fname), RVAR P(Mi), RVAR P(Sname), RVAR P(Addr_1), RVAR P(Addr_2), RVAR P(Addr_3), RVAR P(Addr_4), RVAR P(City), RVAR P(State), RVAR P(Zip), RVAR P(Phone), RVAR P(MaritalStat), RVAR P(Sex), RVAR P(BirthDate), RVAR P(Ssn), RVAR P(EthnicId), RVAR P(Citizen), RVAR P(Handicap), RVAR P(Nationality), RVAR P(WStatus), RVAR P(Military), RVAR P(HireDate), RVAR P(ADate), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: LinkToEmpDirDepBankAccounts
EventHandler.Response: EmployeeDirectDepositBankAccounts( SETVARVALUES(EmpNumV=V(EmpNumV), RankV=V(RankV), RankRow=V(RankRow)) LINKBY(EmpNum=EmpNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(EmpNumV=V(EmpNumV), RankV=V(RankV)) )

EventHandler.Name: SalaryChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLEmployees.EmpSalaryCalcSp( PARMS(VAR P(PayFreq), VAR P(Salary), RVAR P(RegRate), RVAR P(OtRate), RVAR P(DtRate), RVAR P(MfgRegRate), RVAR P(MfgOtRate), RVAR P(MfgDtRate), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLEmployees.PredisplayEmployeesSp( PARMS(RVAR V(EmpTypeHourlyPerm), RVAR V(EmpTypeSalaryPerm), RVAR V(checkSsnEnabled), RVAR V(Prenote)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormSave
EventHandler.Response: SLEmpPrbanks.ValidateDirDepAccountSp( PARMS(VAR P(EmpNum), VAR P(SLEmpPrBanks.BankNum), VAR P(SLEmpPrBanks.DepAccount), VAR P(SLEmpPrBanks.NewRank), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSaveCompleted
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_StdObjectSaveCompleted_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.RefreshCurrentObject() ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR Employees, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) )

EventHandler.Name: ToggleButtonBar
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace Mongoose.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_ToggleButtonBar_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Value = "1" Then ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").SetValue("0") Else ThisForm.Variables("ButtonBarVisible").Set
EventHandler.Response2: Value("1") End If ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namespace )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceDirectDepositBankAccountsGrid
Variable.Value: object.SLEmpPrBanks( CA(RNCSDVIO) OBJNAME(oSLEmpPrBanks) ORDERBY(Rank) LINKBY(EmpNum=EmpNum) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLEmployees( POSTQUERY(EmployeesPostQuerySP(RowPointer,BYREF Salary,BYREF RegRate,BYREF OtRate,BYREF DtRate,BYREF MfgRegRate,BYREF MfgOtRate,BYREF MfgDtRate)) )

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If strName <> "" And strFname & strMI <> "" Then
'Ask to use recalculated review date only if in change mode and the review date isn't blank, else default
If Not SubColCache Is Nothing And SubColCache.GetNumEntries() > 0 Then
If DoLink = 1 And Not LinkedChildIsUp Then
If WIAltVar = "1" And oCol1.GetObjectProperty("MaritalStat", index) = "H" Then
